subTitle: Manav, a humble mechanic, is deeply in love with Archana, a hardworking middle-class girl. They marry, but their happiness is soon overshadowed by a series of crises within their family.

title: Sapne Suhane Ladakpan Ke
subTitle: In fulfilment of her mother's dying wish, Gunjan, a spirited teenager, is sent to live with her aunt. As she gradually adjusts to her new life, she finds solace in her shy cousin, Rachna.

title: Ek Mahanayak: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar
subTitle: This show is about Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar. After his family faces caste discrimination, he works hard to learn, aims to educate others, and strives to end inequality.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Bhor Bhakti Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of melodious songs sung and composed by talented artists is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Santoshi Maa
subTitle: Dadi is shocked to learn that Santoshi will be marrying three men at once. Later, Santoshi learns the truth about her marriage and confronts her aunts.

title: Shoorveer Sisters
subTitle: A princess in a magical land strives to bring her seven brothers, who are stuck in the form of flowers, back to life and remove the curse on her kingdom.

title: Shoorveer Sister
subTitle: Mallika dreams about Parul sitting on her throne and punishing her for taking Padmavati hostage in her prison. On reaching the tunnel, Parul and Raghav transform into tiny beings to avoid being noticed.

title: Doli Armaanon Ki
subTitle: Urmi, a simple girl wanting to marry Prince Charming, enters into an arranged marriage with wealthy businessman Samrat, who soon reveals himself to be an abusive husband.
